headline: 2+ yrs React/Next.js Expert | AI-Augmented Full-Stack Dev | Node.js | Mobile | 70%+ Code Gen with AI
summary: I am a seasoned software engineer with a strong background in React.js, Next.js, and AI-augmented full-stack development, leveraging technologies like Node.js, React Native, and MongoDB to deliver high-performance applications. With experience in developing multi-tier RBAC admin panels, real-time chat systems, and data-heavy dashboards, I have consistently demonstrated my ability to accelerate feature delivery and enhance user engagement. I am excited to explore new opportunities where I can utilize my technical strengths and passion for AI-assisted development to drive innovation and growth.
